title: Custom eggless birthday cakes for Marsden Park and Schofields
summary:
Custom eggless birthday cake near Marsden Park. No eggs, any design, 48 hours notice. This is what that looks like.

The Riverstone store opened December 2024. Families in Marsden Park, Schofields, and Box Hill no longer need to drive to Parramatta for a genuinely custom eggless cake.

100% eggless — not some cakes, every cake. Six sizes. Fifteen flavours including Rasmalai, Mango, and Ferrero Rocher. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Photo references accepted; we recreate the design.

48-hour minimum notice. That's not slow — that's what fresh baking actually takes.

Shop 8, Riverstone Shopping Centre. Free parking. Open from 6am weekdays. Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
